name: monitoring-tool
description: Monitoring tool with agent, client, and server

scripts.start: concurrently --names "SERVER,AGENT-1,AGENT-2,AGENT-3,CLIENT" --prefix-colors "blue,green,cyan,magenta,yellow" "npm start --prefix server" "npm start --prefix agent" "npm start --prefix agent-2" "npm start --prefix agent-3" "npm start --prefix client"
